rect.style: fill: rgb(255, 255, 255); stroke-width: 2px; stroke: rgb(108, 10, 247); filter: url("#drop-shadow-filter-0");

text.style: fill: rgb(46, 0, 234); font-family: "CCGothChic Black"; font-size: 57px; white-space: pre;
fill: rgb(139, 139, 139); font-family: "CCGothChic Black"; font-size: 34px; text-anchor: middle; white-space: pre;
text.tspan: It's a two-player game. On each turn, a player draws a line
between two adjacent dots. If a player completes the fourth
side of a square, they claim it and take another turn. A player
should also think strategically about blocking their opponent
from completing squares. The player who claims
